author: aarongilly
description: Create semantic knowledge graphs using Canvases to modify note properties graphically.

manifest.author: Aaron Gillespie
manifest.description: Create semantic knowledge graphs using Canvases to modify note properties graphically.
manifest.name: Semantic Canvas

name: Semantic Canvas

releases.author: aarongilly
releases.description:
Some bug fixes - and:
- conversion of the "ignore alias" to a configurable list of properties to ignore.
- addition of better iconography

releases.author: aarongilly
releases.description:
v1.2 Adds in new functions to Semantic Canvas. Highlights:
- Ability to pull data into existing canvases
- Fine-grained operations on individual notes
- Option to ignore aliases
releases.name: Release v1.2

releases.author: aarongilly
releases.description: This release contains a couple of bug fixes. Now when you right-click on a note and select from the menu, it will use the note you selected - not whatever happens to be active at the moment.

releases.author: aarongilly
releases.description:
Change behavior to respect the file you right-click on when activating the commands via a right-click menu in a canvas or in the file browser.

Also testing out how updates work. Never published an updated release since the initial one which was accepted by Obsidian.

releases.author: aarongilly
releases.description: This release candidate changes capitalization to adhere to Obsidian's plugin style guide and adds new Note-to-Canvas capabilities.

releases.author: aarongilly
releases.description: This is the initial release of the Semantic Canvas plugin for Obsidian. Submitting it to Obsidian for consideration for their plugins list. It has the minimum basic functionality to make it useful. It adds two commands to Obsidian to have a Canvas either (1) append or (2) overwrite the relevant keys in a Markdown file's YAML frontmatter (i.e. it updates note properties).
